primary_argument: G3B.SI is consolidating at its absolute 10-day high while commanding 25% above-average volume, proving that capital is actively rotating into SGD-denominated stability and dividend yield ahead of the inevitable tech rotation.
supporting_evidence: Price sits exactly at its 10-day high of $5.47 with a range position of 1.0, confirming immediate upward momentum. Volume is running at 1.25x the 30-day average, signaling decisive accumulation despite normal regime conditions. Trading $0.23 above its 50-day MA ($5.24) with a 5-day return of +2.82% demonstrates sustained trend strength independent of US equity volatility.
key_assumption: Singapore's three major banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB) maintain their current dividend payout discipline and net interest margins while the SGD/USD rate holds at or below 1.34.
regime_sensitivity: A shift to high_vix would massively accelerate this call as capital rapidly seeks SGD safe-haven status and reliable dividend yield, turning G3B.SI into the portfolio's primary compounding engine during equity drawdowns.
watch_items: Close below $5.24 on a single session with volume exceeding 1.5x the 30-day average
SGD/USD depreciates beyond 1.38, permanently eroding the currency hedge and USD-denominated dividend returns
